Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by or on behalf of Self-represented Plaintiff. Peter Holm, Esq., specially appearing for Defendant Alphabet, Inc.
There being no appearance nor an objection the Court Ordered case dismissed with prejudice at the request of self-represented Plaintiff. Court ordered the clerk of the court to file correspondence from Plaintiff requesting the Court to dismiss the case. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported.
